strengths: Currently building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, directly aligned with the strategic need to identify and test AI-driven opportunities
20+ years of full-stack engineering with proven capability to architect systems at scale—deep expertise in cloud (AWS), infrastructure, and high-performance systems design
Established track record inspiring technical communities through teaching, open-source projects, and 10+ years stewarding the GISCollective platform
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; current AI infrastructure role is recent (April 2025) with limited prior demonstrated AI product or platform building
Previous roles emphasized domain-specific optimization and operational engineering without clear evidence of director-level strategic platform thinking or customer advisory work
Limited public recognition or published thought leadership demonstrating external AI expertise, innovation patterns, or architectural vision

key_factors.factor: Current hands-on AI infrastructure expertise (MCP, agentic workflows)
20+ years of full-stack technical depth with cloud and infrastructure capabilities
Limited demonstrated AI product/platform track record prior to current role

response.justification: Bogdan's 20+ years of hands-on software engineering—currently focused on AI-agent infrastructure and modern frameworks—positions him to identify and test strategic AI opportunities while collaborating with engineering teams. His full-stack depth across cloud, systems architecture, and high-performance design provides the technical credibility required for director-level impact. While he lacks prior AI product experience, his pragmatic, builder-first learning approach—evident in current MCP and agentic workflow work—aligns well with the role's need to advise teams and customers on adopting cutting-edge AI technologies and work through difficult, disruptive challenges.
